CRC 3.740 REVIEW
MINI-MINUTES FOR AUG-30-2011 9:30 AM FOR DEPT 301

LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT CRISTINA R. GALIT'S MOTION TO VACATE DEFAULT AND DEFAULT JUDGMENT IS DENIED. DEFENDANT DID NOT PROVIDE A DECLARATION OR ANY OTHER EVIDENCE SUPPORTING HER ASSERTION THAT SHE DID NOT RECEIVE ACTUAL NOTICE OF THE SUMMONS AND COMPLAINT IN TIME TO DEFEND. (PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE ORDER.) JUDGE: HAROLD KAHN, REPORTER: LAVENA WARD, CSR #7077
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE

EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF PORFOLIO RECOVERY ASSOCIATES, LLC AS TO DEFENDANT GALIT, CRISTINA R. DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  AUG-29-2011

LAW AND MOTION 301, DEFENDANT CRISTINA GALIT'S MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT IS TAKEN OFF-CALENDAR. THE MOVING PARTY FAILED TO PROVIDE THE COURT WITH A VALID PROOF OF SERVICE INDICATIVE OF STATUTORILY SUFFICIENT NOTICE AND SERVICE. NO OPPOSITION FILED. JUDGE: PETER J. BUSCH, REPORTER: CAROL A. KAREN, CSR #8189

DEFENDANT CRISTINA GALIT'S MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT IS DENIED FOR FAILURE TO ATTACH A PROPOSED RESPONSIVE PLEADING AS REQUIRED BY C C P 473 (B). PREVAILING PARTY IS TO SUBMIT A PROPOSED FORM OF ORDER. JUDGE: PETER J. BUSCH, REPORTER, CAROL A. KAREN, CSR # 8189 (301)

calendar.matters:
MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND
Off Calendar Oct-11-2011 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
DEFENDANT CRISTINA R. GALIT'S MOTION TO VACATE DEFAULT AND DEFAULT JUDGMENT.

RULING: No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling - Defendant's motion to set aside default and default judgment is denied. Defendant did not provide a declaration or any other evidence supporting her assertion that she did not receive actual notice of the summons and complaint in time to defend. (PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE ORDER.) Judge: Harold Kahn, Reporter: LaVena Ward, CSR #7077

MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND
Off Calendar Aug-30-2011 Denied
MINI MINUTES:

APPEARANCES - CRISTINA R. GALIT, TEL. NO. 694-3909, DEFENDANT APPEARING IN PRO PER;
NO OTHER APPEARANCES ON THE MATTER.

RULING - MS. GALIT PRESENTED THE COURT WITH A PROOF OF SERVICE BUT NOT A PROPOSED RESPONSIVE PLEADING. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: DEFENDANT CRISTINA GALIT'S MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT IS DENIED FOR FAILURE TO ATTACH A PROPOSED RESPONSIVE PLEADING AS REQUIRED BY C C P 473 (B). Prevailing party is to submit a proposed form of order. Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter, Carol A. Karen, CSR # 8189 =301/PJB

MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND
Off Calendar Jul-15-2011 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - CHRISTINA GALIT, TEL. NO. 694-3809, DEFENDANT APPEARING IN PRO PER;
NO OTHER APPEARANCES ON THE MATTER.

RULING - THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: DEFENDANT CRISTINA GALIT'S MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT IS TAKEN OFF-CALENDAR. THE MOVING PARTY FAILED TO PROVIDE THE COURT WITH A VALID PROOF OF SERVICE INDICATIVE OF STATUTORILY SUFFICIENT NOTICE AND SERVICE. NO OPPOSITION FILED. Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter, Carol A.
